creator: omar.polo@protonmail.com
text:
Created attachment 190360
proposed patch

Hello,

With the current version of stack (1.5.1) I'm unable to create new projects (`stack new foo` fails) so I tried to update the port. I'm not an haskell developer btw.

Following the comment at the top of the makefile I've updated the version number and checksums. I've successfully compiled it in a clean jail on FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE.
